with stored-up impressions of bygone births. Why should, other-
wise, people go to the distant Varanasi and bathe in the holy river
GaAga that was brought down from Heaven to the earth by King

of jdtffarrJT. The mistake evidently must have been committed by
the scribes. The description of the place of the holy bath that

The royal bath should be performed in a forest-region, which

Royal Ablution XLVIll 407
is devoid of cordia, beleric myrobalan, thorny, pungent, bitter, and
badsmelling trees; which is not frequented by owls, vultures and
such other inauspicious birds ; which is full of young trees, shrubs,
creepers and bowers, and which consists mostly of beautiful and
sweet trees with unspoilt leaves and sprouts.
u\sn
